fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry number of the cost adjustment trace log entry.

fields.name: Cost Adjustment Run Guid
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unique identifier of the cost adjustment run.

fields.name: Event Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the event that is traced.

fields.name: Traced Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the table ID of the traced entry.

fields.name: Item Cost Source/Recipient
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the traced entry acts as a cost source or recipient.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number of the traced entry.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code of the traced entry.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant code of the traced entry.

fields.name: Valuation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the valuation date of the traced entry.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the traced entry.

fields.name: Order Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order type of the traced entry.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order number of the traced entry.

fields.name: Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order line number of the traced entry.

fields.name: Custom Dimensions
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional information about the traced entry.
